response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile senior engineer, but her profile does not match this role's core requirements. Her C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments (~7 months in 2014-2015) and a thesis project, far short of the mandated 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. She has no Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking systems experience (RIDE Capital is fintech-adjacent but retail investment tooling, not capital markets), and her database background centers on MongoDB/MySQL rather than SQL Server or Oracle.
strengths: Strong systems background with low-latency, high-throughput services (DLang, async I/O) transferable to performance-critical work
Solid engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing tooling authorship
Broad polyglot experience with SQL, Java, and scripting languages listed as desirable in the JD
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (~2015), nowhere near the required 5-10 years on Windows
No Fixed Income, derivatives, or capital markets domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience; primary databases are MongoDB and MySQL

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets / fixed income domain
Strong general engineering and performance systems background
